prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 25075→24264→23073→25910→26988，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024 年起连续两年后移，2025 年基准约 26988 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 63 人，2024 年增至 75 人，2025 年略降至 73 人；2026 年计划 78 人，较 2025 年扩招约 6.85%，计划增加对位次有推后效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（主校区）软科 2026 年排名第 38 名，属 985/211/双一流高校；秦皇岛分校共享本部层次与品牌效应，对考生有较强吸引力；东北大学（主校区）2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议；抖音热度排名第 82（一般），未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；依托东北大学本部，控制科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、机械工程 A-、材料科学与工程 A-、软件工程 A-，与物理类招生的计算机类、自动化类、电子信息类、机械类等专业高度对应，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐专业，报考热度持续升温；广东省物理类考生数从 2025 年 440208 增至 2026 年 456000（+3.59%），竞争基数扩大；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北，在广东招生占比中等偏低，跨省报考存在地域距离因素，但 985 分校身份可部分抵消地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 6.85% 及广东省物理类考生增加约 3.59%，供需两端均指向竞争加剧、位次后移；预测最低位次约 28147 名，区间 27647–28647 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
- 电子信息工程/通信工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 物联网工程
- 机械类（含机械工程、车辆工程）
- 仪器类/智能感知工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（含材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程等）
- 经济学类（含经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理等）
- 信息管理与信息系统。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 28147 名，区间 27647–28647 名。建议位次在区间内以二档专业为主（数学类、物联网工程、机械类），一档专业（计算机、自动化、电子信息）可冲刺但竞争激烈；位次明显优于区间下限（<27647）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>28647）建议以三档专业保底，优先考虑材料类或经济学类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 25075→24264→23073→25910→26988, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. Since 2024, rankings have declined for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 26988 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 63 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 75 in 2024, and slightly decreased to 73 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 78, an increase of about 6.85% compared to 2025, which will push rankings further down.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (main campus) ranks 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, and is a 985/211/Double First-Class university. The Qinhuangdao campus shares the main campus's level and brand effect, strongly attracting candidates. The reputation of Northeastern University (main campus) in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly due to campus recognition disputes. Its Douyin popularity ranks 82nd (average), with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Relying on the main campus, it has A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, and A- in Software Engineering, closely matching the Physics Category majors such as Computer, Automation, Electronic Information, and Mechanical Engineering, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended majors with rising application popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong increased from 440,208 in 2025 to 456,000 in 2026 (+3.59%), expanding the competition base. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei, with a moderately low enrollment proportion in Guangdong. Cross-province applications face regional distance factors, but the 985 branch identity can partially offset regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the declining trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.85%, and the increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates by about 3.59%, both supply and demand point to intensified competition and further ranking decline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 28,147, with a range of 27,647–28,647.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Instrumentation/Intelligent Perception Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Economics (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management, etc.)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 28,147, with a range of 27,647–28,647. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Internet of Things Engineering, Mechanical Engineering). Tier 1 majors (Computer, Automation, Electronic Information) can be attempted but are highly competitive. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<27,647) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates near the upper bound (>28,647) should consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing Materials or Economics.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 4671→4688→4945→4918→5521，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025 年较 2024 年后移约 600 名，基准约 5521 名；本省历史类计划 2021–2023 年均为 4 人，2024–2025 年增至 10 人；2026 年计划仍为 10 人，与 2025 年持平，计划无变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（主校区）软科 2026 年排名第 38 名，属 985/211/双一流高校；秦皇岛分校共享本部层次与品牌效应，对历史类考生同样有吸引力；东北大学（主校区）2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音热度一般；历史类招生规模小（10 人），声誉波动对报考心理影响有限；东北大学本部优势学科以工科为主，历史类招生专业（经济学类、工商管理类、外国语言文学类）与本部优势学科关联度较低，学科评估支撑较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济学类/金融/财经/经济 2026 年热度为分化观望，工商管理类/会计/财务/审计 为推荐，外国语言文学类 为一般观望；广东省历史类考生数从 2025 年 292200 增至 2026 年 326200（+11.64%），竞争基数显著扩大；省控线（本科批）2025 年 464 较 2024 年 428 大幅上升，反映整体竞争加剧；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北，历史类在广东仅招 10 人，跨省报考存在地域距离因素，但 985 分校身份对历史类考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划持平但广东省历史类考生大幅增加约 11.64% 及省控线上移，竞争明显加剧；预测最低位次约 5571 名，区间 5071–6071 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济学类（含经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无（历史类仅 3 个招生专业，已全部列入一档和三档）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 外国语言文学类（含英语、日语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 5571 名，区间 5071–6071 名。历史类仅 3 个招生专业，建议位次在区间内以经济学类或工商管理类为主攻方向；位次明显优于区间下限（<5071）可冲刺经济学类；位次接近区间上限（>6071）建议以外国语言文学类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4671→4688→4945→4918→5521, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 600 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of approximately 5521. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 students in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan remains at 10 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (main campus) ranks 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, belonging to the 985/211/Double First-Class universities. The Qinhuangdao campus shares the level and brand effect of the main campus, which is also attractive to History Category candidates. The reputation evaluation of Northeastern University (main campus) in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with average popularity on Douyin. The small enrollment scale for History Category (10 students) limits the impact of reputation fluctuations on application psychology. The dominant disciplines of Northeastern University's main campus are engineering, while the History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with the main campus's strengths, providing weak disciplinary evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of Economics/Finance/Finance/Economy is differentiated and wait-and-see, Business Administration/Accounting/Finance/Audit is recommended, and Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see. The number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province increased from 292,200 in 2025 to 326,200 in 2026 (+11.64%), significantly expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose sharply from 428 in 2024 to 464 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei, with only 10 History Category students enrolled in Guangdong. Cross-provincial applications involve geographical distance factors, but the 985 branch identity still holds some appeal for History Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking backward, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 11.64% in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province, and the upward shift of the provincial control line, competition has clearly intensified. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5571, with a range of 5071–6071.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Economics (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- None (History Category has only 3 enrollment majors, all listed in Tier 1 and Tier 3).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 5571, with a range of 5071–6071. History Category has only 3 enrollment majors. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Economics or Business Administration as the main direction. Those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<5071) can aim for Economics. Those with rankings near the upper limit (>6071) are advised to use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option.
